title: sida lonchitis
intro: Sida lonchitis, also known as country mallow or buttonweed, is a plant species belonging to the Malvaceae family. It is primarily used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and astringent properties. The health benefits of Sida lonchitis include treating wounds, skin issues, and digestive problems, as well as reducing fever and relieving pain. Herbal preparations of Sida lonchitis include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or internally to reap its medicinal benefits.
